nodes.context: Outlaw motorcycle club involved in drug trafficking, murder, and other crimes in Nova Scotia from 1984 to 2003.
Halifax biker gang that patched over to become the first Hells Angels chapter in Atlantic Canada in 1984.
Montreal-based organized crime group involved in drug trafficking and money lending.
Breakaway gang founded by former Hells Angel Randy Mersereau in 1998.
Spryfield-based gang allied with Hells Angels, involved in drug trade and murder.

edges.context: Thirteenth Tribe patched over to become the Halifax chapter of Hells Angels in 1984.
West End Gang boss Ross forgave drug debts of Halifax Hells Angels in exchange for payments to Trudeau.
Mersereau broke away from Hells Angels to form his own gang, leading to his murder ordered by Carroll.
Marriot brothers were allied with Hells Angels, involved in drug trade and murder for the club.
